_description: LOCKED mockup parameters for high-converting Facebook ads
_reference: Based on output/coffee-lifestyle-v4.png - shirt fills frame, centered

background_requirements.center: clear - no props in center 60% of frame
background_requirements.props: frame edges only, relevant to niche

best_practices.shirt_size: 55% of frame width for clear visibility
best_practices.shirt_position: centered horizontally, slightly above center vertically
best_practices.design_visibility: design should be clearly readable at thumbnail size
best_practices.background_contrast: dark background for black shirt to pop with subtle edge definition
best_practices.props_placement: corners and edges only, never obscuring shirt
